label: 下载并展示视频
description: Search for a public video page from a user request, download the authorized video artifact, and preview it in an Output node.

state_1.name: video_request
state_1.description: User request describing what kind of public video to find and preview.
state_1.value: 找一个公开可访问的视频页面，下载视频并在 Output 中预览

state_2.name: search_query
state_2.description: Search query used to find a public video page or direct media URL.

state_3.name: search_results
state_3.description: Structured web search results used to choose a candidate video URL.

state_4.name: candidate_video_url
state_4.description: Selected public video page or direct media URL derived from search results.

state_5.name: downloaded_video_files
state_5.description: Downloaded video artifact references returned by web_media_downloader.

state_6.name: download_summary
state_6.description: Short summary of the selected URL and local artifact paths.

input_video_request.name: input_video_request
input_video_request.description: Describe the kind of public video to find.

config.value: 找一个公开可访问的视频页面，下载视频并在 Output 中预览

plan_video_search.name: plan_video_search
plan_video_search.description: Turn the request into a focused web search query for public video media.

config.taskInstruction: 根据 video_request 生成一个联网搜索词，用来找到公开可访问、可下载或可由媒体下载工具解析的视频页面。不要写死任何 URL；如果请求很泛，优先搜索 public domain video sample、open video mp4、official sample video、public test media 等公开视频来源。只输出适合搜索的简短查询。

web_search_agent.name: web_search_agent
web_search_agent.description: Search the web and choose a candidate video URL from the results.

config.taskInstruction: 根据 search_query 和 web_search 技能返回的搜索结果，选择一个最可能包含公开可访问视频或直接媒体文件的 URL，写入 candidate_video_url。不要编造 URL；只能从搜索结果 URL 中选择。优先选择官方样例、公共测试媒体、公共领域视频或明确公开的视频页面；避免需要登录、付费、DRM 或私有访问的来源。

download_video_agent.name: download_video_agent
download_video_agent.description: Download the selected public video URL and summarize local artifact paths.

config.taskInstruction: 根据 candidate_video_url 和 web_media_downloader 技能结果写一个简短 download_summary。必须列出选中的 URL、下载是否成功，以及 downloaded_video_files 中的 local_path。不要输出原始视频内容；Output 节点会读取本地 artifact 进行预览。

output_downloaded_video.name: output_downloaded_video
output_downloaded_video.description: Preview downloaded video artifacts from local skill artifact paths.

output_download_summary.name: output_download_summary
output_download_summary.description: Show the selected source URL and downloaded local artifact paths.
